roa.docketEntryComment: TO TERMINATE PROB
PROB TERMINATED
SEE MINS OF 8/29/94 IN D22
CONT 8/30/94 TS HG MTR/DA 9AM IN D22;2PM-CONT 9/27/94 TERM PROB 9AM-D22
CONT TO 8/29/94 TS HG MTR/DA W/#156358 AT 9AM IN D22
CONT 8/22/94 AT 9AM IN S22 FOR HG MTR/DA-& JOIN SCN #156358
CONT 8/18/94 AT 9AM IN S21 FOR HG MTR/DA & JOIN SCN#156358
CALENDARED IN ERROR-SHOULD BE 8/17/94 IN D21
TRANSF TO D26 FOR HG MTR/DA & JOIN 156358 AT 9AM ON 8/15/94
CONT TO 7/26/94 FOR TS HG MTR/DA & JOIN #156358 AT 9AM IN D22
DEF CNSL EXPRESS DOUBT PURS 1368PC;CRIM PROC S/SCT APPTS DR D/STEIN EXAM DEFT PURS 1368PC & CONT 6/15/94 IN D22 9AM
CRIM PROC SUSP;CONT 5/19/94 AT 9AM IN S22 FOR HG MTR/DA-TO JOIN NEW CASE
TRANSF TO D24 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 9AM ON 5/18/94
PD APPTD;REF APD SR;CONT 5/2/94 TS HG MTR/DA AT 9AM IN D22;REMANDED
REM PROB SAME T/C
PJ1Y/NOT/CTS45D/WVD 105D CTS PERM/SA2;MAIN LIBRARY,SF/OP REST-10%FEE
CONT 11/29/93 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR TS HG MTR/DA
PD APPTD;REF APD S/R TO BE FILED 11/16/93;DEFT REMANDEDTRANSF TO D25 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 845AM ON 11/22/93
/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ105D/CTS 45 //WS/VF1/RESTV/PC/PSR/NOT/
CERTIFIED TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENTENCE
